detail.description: Greg Jones bunt pops out softly to pitcher Michael Soroka.
Greg Jones flies out to shortstop Geraldo Perdomo.
Greg Jones lines out to center fielder Oneil Cruz.
Greg Jones grounds out, second baseman Brandon Lowe to first baseman Spencer Horwitz.
Greg Jones lines out to center fielder Oneil Cruz.
Greg Jones out on a sacrifice bunt, catcher Tyler Heineman to second baseman Lenyn Sosa. Garrett Mitchell to 2nd.
Greg Jones singles on a line drive to center fielder Daulton Varsho.
Greg Jones grounds out softly to first baseman Kazuma Okamoto.
Greg Jones grounds out to first baseman Connor Norby. Brandon Lockridge to 3rd.
Greg Jones grounds out, shortstop Otto Lopez to first baseman Connor Norby.
Greg Jones grounds into a force out, fielded by shortstop Otto Lopez. Jake Bauers scores. Luis Rengifo to 3rd. Garrett Mitchell out at 2nd. Greg Jones to 1st.
Greg Jones grounds out, third baseman Graham Pauley to first baseman Connor Norby.
Greg Jones flies out to center fielder Lars Nootbaar.
Greg Jones singles on a ground ball to second baseman Hao-Yu Lee, deflected by shortstop Kevin McGonigle. David Hamilton to 2nd.
